tool.name: encode_payload
tool.description:
Run a payload through a chain of encoders for WAF bypass.
Available encoders: url, url_double, url_all, base64, base64_url, hex, unicode, html_entities, html_entities_hex, html_escape, case_swap, sql_comment_split, js_string.
Pipelines are applied in order — output of one feeds into the next.

parameter.name: pipeline
parameter.description: Ordered list of encoder names, e.g. ["url", "url"] for double URL encoding.

tool.name: suggest_encoding_for_waf
tool.description: Return 5-10 encoding pipelines known to bypass specific WAF/context combos. Call encode_payload with each suggested pipeline to get the ready-to-send variants.

parameter.name: waf_vendor
parameter.description: cloudflare / akamai / aws_waf / imperva / sucuri / modsecurity / generic
